title: lannea schweinfurthii var. stuhlmannii
intro: Lannea schweinfurthii var. stuhlmannii is a variety of the Lannea schweinfurthii plant species, which is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Africa. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Lannea schweinfurthii var. stuhlmannii is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which can be consumed as teas or used topically for skin issues and wounds.
